title: Application configuration loader with environment validation
purpose: Loads and validates application settings from environment variables and defaults, providing a centralized configuration object for the server.
module_context: Defines the project root directory by detecting the current module location in both Bun and Node.js environments, then builds a configuration object with validated port number and default values for server settings.

steps.content: Read the PORT environment variable or default to '9002'.
Convert the port value to an integer.
IF the conversion results in NaN, throw an error indicating invalid port format.
IF the port number is outside the valid range of 1-65535, throw an error indicating out-of-range value.
